name: Space-Age-Hardcore-Mode
title: ​Space Age: Hardcore Mode
author: thesixthroc
description:
Space Age: Hardcore Mode is the game Wube would have made if they didn't need to cater to more casual players.

It's not a gratuitous difficulty mod. We simply aim to tighten the gameplay of Space Age.

Players need to start from scratch on Vulcanus, Fulgora and Gleba, and there are incentives to build a small on-planet science chain. Optional dependencies are additional Vanilla+ content.

Virtually every tweak in this modpack is configurable in the settings.
